name: Intercom
description: Monitor Intercom admin access and contact data management for compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. In Intercom, go to the Developer Hub
2. Open your app (or create one)
3. Go to Configure > Authentication and copy the Access Token
4. Select your region (check your Intercom URL to determine which region you're on)
5. Paste the Access Token and select your region below

credentialFields.label: Access Token
credentialFields.helpText: Your Intercom Access Token. In Intercom, go to Developer Hub, open your app (or create one), then find the token under Configure > Authentication.

credentialFields.label: Region
credentialFields.helpText: Select the region where your Intercom workspace is hosted

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Intercom admins and verifies access is appropriate

checks.name: Contact Information
checks.description: Verifies Intercom contact data is being maintained
